testcase.name: Successful login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the login page.........................................passed When the user enters username "tomsmith" and password "SuperSecretPassword!".passed And the user clicks the login button........................................passed Then the user should be redirected to the secure area.......................passed And a success "You logged into a secure area!" should be displayed..........passed

testcase.name: Verify default checkbox states
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the checkboxes page....................................passed Then the first checkbox should be unchecked.................................passed And the second checkbox should be checked...................................passed

testcase.name: Select the first checkbox
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the checkboxes page....................................passed When the user selects the first checkbox....................................passed Then the first checkbox should be checked...................................passed

testcase.name: Unselect the second checkbox
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the checkboxes page....................................passed When the user unselects the second checkbox.................................passed Then the second checkbox should be unchecked................................passed

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................passed When I search for "GitHub"..................................................passed Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................passed
